top_signals: Israel kills Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib overnight — 3rd senior official assassinated (after Larijani, Soleimani)
Iran retaliates for Larijani assassination: cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv, 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets
Hormuz partially reopening: ~90 ships crossed, Iran allowing non-enemy traffic. Araghchi: 'Open but closed to our enemies'
Kabul hospital death toll 400 from Pakistan airstrike. Taliban warns retaliation — all-out war risk
Israel destroys 10-storey building in central Beirut. Evacuation orders for 50 villages in South Lebanon + Beqaa Valley
Joe Kent resigns as NCTC director: 'Iran posed no imminent threat.' First admin official to quit over war
Fresh Iranian missile/drone barrages on Gulf states — all intercepted
Oil elevated. Trump says US doesn't need NATO help for Hormuz — unilateral stance
Zelensky in UK, Starmer warns Putin must not benefit from Iran war. Ukraine peace frozen
Senate Intel hearing TODAY — Gabbard defends Trump's imminent threat call. Political inflection point

Senate Intel hearing TODAY — narrative inflection, not battlefield inflection.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills Iran's Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib overnight — 3rd senior official assassinated
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Sky News / Guardian / ABC News
latest_news.text: Israeli Defense Minister Katz confirms overnight strike killed Iran's Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib and senior ministry figures. Third high-profile assassination after Larijani (SNSC head) and Soleimani (Basij commander). Intensity of strikes 'increasing' per Katz.

latest_news.headline: Iran allowing more ships through Strait of Hormuz — partial reopening confirmed
latest_news.text: ~90 ships including oil tankers have crossed Hormuz since war began. Iran exporting millions of barrels despite 'blockade.' IRGC allowing passage to non-enemy nations. Araghchi: 'Open but closed to our enemies.' Traffic nearly doubled in recent days.

latest_news.headline: Iran retaliates for Larijani killing — cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv, 2 killed
latest_news.text: IRGC claims missiles hit 100+ Israeli targets. 2 killed near Tel Aviv. Army chief Hatami vows 'decisive and regrettable' retaliation. Fresh barrages across Gulf — all 4 states intercept.

latest_news.headline: Kabul hospital death toll reaches 400 — Taliban warns retaliation
latest_news.text: Pakistan airstrike on Kabul drug treatment hospital death toll updated to 400. Third strike on Afghan capital. Taliban warns retaliation — could trigger all-out war between two nuclear-armed neighbors.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes central Beirut — 10-storey building destroyed, casualties reported
latest_news.text: Israeli airstrike levels 10-storey building in central Beirut (Bashoura). Evacuation orders for 50 villages across South Lebanon and Beqaa Valley. Hezbollah fires rockets at northern Israel.

latest_news.headline: Joe Kent resigns as NCTC director — 'Iran posed no imminent threat'
latest_news.source: Washington Post / Politico / NBC / CNN / DW
latest_news.text: First Trump official to quit over Iran war. Cited Israeli 'misinformation' and lies about 'swift path to victory.' Gabbard hearing postponed to Thursday. Political earthquake in Washington.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky visits UK — Starmer warns Putin must not benefit from Iran war
latest_news.text: Zelensky addresses UK Parliament. Starmer says Russia must not reap rewards of higher oil prices or easing sanctions due to Middle East instability. Peace process frozen as Trump focused on Iran.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 11:04 UTC) — War Day 24. ESCALATION CONTINUES: (1) Israel kills Iran's Intelligence Minister Khatib — 3rd senior official eliminated in 48hrs (Larijani, Soleimani, Khatib); (2) Iran retaliates with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv; (3) Hormuz partially reopening but US/Israeli ships still banned; (4) Kabul hospital death toll 400, Taliban threatens all-out war; (5) Israel destroys building in central Beirut. Kent resignation political earthquake. Senate hearing TODAY. ZERO ceasefire signals in any theater.
